subject: Den of the Whispered Word
fact: The Den of the Whispered Word is a grand structure of black and red marble located about a day's travel from Teegan and Drystan.
source_quote: The party arrives at the 'Den of the Whispered Word', about a day's travel from Teegan and Drystan

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan refuses to follow the party further into the cavern.
source_quote: Teegan and Drystan refuse to follow the party further

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan refuses to follow the party further into the cavern.
source_quote: Teegan and Drystan refuse to follow the party further

subject: vast cavern
fact: The tunnel opens into a vast cavern with stalactites and stalagmites.
source_quote: The tunnel opens into a vast cavern with stalactites and stalagmites

subject: black and red marble building
fact: A 50-foot-high black and red marble building stands in the center of the cavern.
source_quote: In the center stands a 50-foot-high black and red marble building

subject: smaller buildings
fact: Two smaller 30-foot-high buildings flank the central marble building.
source_quote: flanked by two smaller 30-foot-high buildings

subject: fairy fire illumination
fact: The domes of the buildings are lit by blue, green, and purple fairy fire.
source_quote: The domes are lit by blue, green, and purple fairy fire

subject: brass doors
fact: The party approaches ornate brass doors carved with self-adulating images of a half-elf becoming rich and powerful.
source_quote: The party approaches ornate brass doors carved with self-adulating images of a half-elf becoming rich and powerful

subject: construct
fact: A construct stands sentry at the brass doors.
source_quote: A construct stands sentry at the door

subject: smaller building
fact: An oil lamp flickers inside a smaller building.
source_quote: an oil lamp flickers inside a smaller building

subject: knocking on doors
fact: The party knocks on the brass doors.
source_quote: The party knocks on the brass doors

subject: Gabberforth
fact: A deep gnome named Gabberforth, accompanied by a shield guardian, answers the door.
source_quote: A deep gnome named Gabberforth, accompanied by a shield guardian, answers

subject: Gabberforth
fact: Gabberforth demands to know who the party is and why they are disturbing his master.
source_quote: demanding to know who they are and why they are disturbing his master

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Gabberforth identifies Maram il Vass as his master.
source_quote: disturbing his master, Maram il Vass

subject: Arcana check
fact: Daein uses an Arcana check to understand how to approach such creatures.
source_quote: Daein uses an Arcana check to understand how to approach such creatures

subject: negotiation advice
fact: Daein learns that negotiation is often preferred over bluffing.
source_quote: learning that negotiation is often preferred over bluffing

subject: party entry request
fact: The party states they wish to speak to Maram il Vass, acting as if they have legitimate business.
source_quote: The party states they wish to speak to Maram il Vass, acting as if they have legitimate business

subject: Gabberforth grants entry
fact: Gabberforth allows the party entry.
source_quote: Gabberforth allows them entry

subject: entrance foyer
fact: Inside, the air is filled with expensive incense and perfume.
source_quote: Inside, the air is filled with expensive incense and perfume

subject: entrance foyer
fact: The entrance foyer features tapestries depicting the half-elf's rise to power.
source_quote: The entrance foyer features tapestries depicting the half-elf's rise to power

subject: entrance foyer
fact: The entrance foyer contains vases with flowers and unusual creatures.
source_quote: and vases with flowers and unusual creatures

subject: spell saving decision
fact: The party decides to save Bramgrim's True Seeing spell for the direct encounter with Maram il Vass.
source_quote: The party decides to save Bramgrim's True Seeing spell for the direct encounter with Maram il Vass

subject: grand chamber
fact: The party enters a grand chamber with a polished white marble floor.
source_quote: They enter a grand chamber with a polished white marble floor

subject: purple wooden desk
fact: A large purple wooden desk sits in the grand chamber.
source_quote: and a large purple wooden desk

subject: half-elf disguise
fact: A 'rakishly handsome' half-elf sits at the desk.
source_quote: A 'rakishly handsome' half-elf sits at the desk

subject: True Seeing cast
fact: Bramgrim casts True Seeing, revealing that the 'half-elf' is actually a Yugoloth.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts True Seeing, revealing that the 'half-elf' is actually a Yugoloth

subject: Yugoloth
fact: The Yugoloth is a type of demon known for making contracts.
source_quote: a type of demon known for making contracts

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass, now revealed, speaks of the 'endless blood war'.
source_quote: Maram il Vass, now revealed, speaks of the 'endless blood war'

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass immediately identifies Felkur and knows about a group that wants him.
source_quote: immediately identifies Felkur, knowing about a group that wants him

subject: offer to help Felkur
fact: Maram offers to help Felkur with his problem in exchange for something.
source_quote: Maram offers to help Felkur with his problem in exchange for something

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Maram confirms he has the Drow named Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: Maram confirms he has the Drow named Xaven Tanor'this

subject: acquisition of Xaven
fact: Maram acquired Xaven Tanor'this from fire giants.
source_quote: whom he acquired from fire giants

subject: treatment of Xaven
fact: Maram has treated Xaven Tanor'this with 'hospitality'.
source_quote: and has treated with 'hospitality'

subject: trade offer for Felkur
fact: Maram il Vass offers to exchange Xaven Tanor'this for Felkur.
source_quote: Maram il Vass offers to exchange Xaven Tanor'this for Felkur

subject: party rejection of Felkur trade
fact: The party rejects the trade of Felkur, with Bramgrim vehemently refusing.
source_quote: The party rejects the trade of Felkur, with Bramgrim vehemently refusing

subject: trade offer for Bramgrim
fact: Maram suggests trading Bramgrim instead.
source_quote: Maram suggests trading Bramgrim instead

subject: party rejection of Bramgrim trade
fact: The party finds the offer to trade Bramgrim unfair.
source_quote: but the party still finds the offer unfair

subject: monetary trade offer
fact: Maram il Vass offers Xaven Tanor'this for 10,000 gold pieces.
source_quote: Maram il Vass then offers Xaven Tanor'this for 10,000 gold pieces

subject: item trade offer
fact: Maram il Vass offers Xaven Tanor'this for two rare magical items.
source_quote: or two rare magical items

subject: Felkur's fake item plan
fact: Felkur considers using his infusion ability to create fake rare magical items that only last eight hours.
source_quote: Felkur considers using his infusion ability to create fake rare magical items that only last eight hours

subject: request for privacy
fact: The party requests time to discuss and decide which rare items to offer, and asks for privacy.
source_quote: The party requests time to discuss and decide which rare items to offer, and asks for privacy

subject: Maram agrees to privacy
fact: Maram il Vass reluctantly agrees to their privacy, offering a side office.
source_quote: Maram il Vass reluctantly agrees to their privacy, offering a side office

subject: privacy contract
fact: Maram il Vass presents a contract for their privacy agreement.
source_quote: Maram il Vass presents a contract for their privacy agreement

subject: contract scrutiny
fact: The party scrutinizes the contract for loopholes.
source_quote: which the party scrutinizes for loopholes

subject: contract negotiation
fact: The party negotiates the terms of the contract to ensure Maram won't spy on them or disrupt their deliberations.
source_quote: The party negotiates the terms of the contract to ensure Maram won't spy on them or disrupt their deliberations

subject: demons
fact: Two more demons are revealed to be in the back room as the party prepares to enter the side office.
source_quote: Two more demons are revealed to be in the back room as the party prepares to enter the side office

subject: Underdark
fact: The Underdark is a vast, subterranean realm.
source_quote: A vast, subterranean realm

subject: Underdark
fact: The Underdark is filled with hazards like bottomless pits, madness shrooms, and poison spores.
source_quote: filled with hazards like bottomless pits, madness shrooms, and poison spores
